tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Question Tags.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Question Tags का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You are coming, aren't you? He didn't come, did he? This is beautiful, isn't it? You don't like this, do you? He sings well, doesn't he?

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Question Tags.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Question Tags का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We will meet, won't we? You did this, didn't you? She is a doctor, isn't she? You can do this, can't you? She likes this, doesn't she?

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "तुम भूखे नहीं हो, हो ना?"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You are not hungry, are you?

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "You don't like this, do you? yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You don't like this, do you?

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Question Tags.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Question Tags का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You have eaten food, haven't you? They will come, won't they? I am right, aren't I? You didn't do this, did you?
